title: chat_query hardcodes limit 200; accounts with >200 chats silently truncated
description: Trigger: JMAP account with more than 200 chats. load_chats calls chat_query with limit: Some(200) and never checks query.total or query.position to detect additional pages. Bad behavior: only the first 200 chats are fetched and displayed; all remaining chats are silently omitted with no error or pagination loop.
